issue.title: www.ole.com.ar
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.ole.com.ar/seleccion/guatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ole.com.ar%2Fseleccion%2Fguatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html) ### Comment > List the website(s) you're having issues with: > > https://www.ole.com.ar/seleccion/guatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html > > What happens? > > The website ole.com.ar hides news content on Android using AdGuard. > In my phone I use AdGuard 4.12.81 on Android 16 (One UI 8.0) > I use the same subscription filter lists on AdGuard and Firefox > When I visit any page on ole.com.ar, the content of the page is blocked. > I use the same filters on my PC and my phone. > On my PC, there is no problem in Chrome and Firefox > > (In Chrome, uBlock is enabled using the "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe" --disable-features=ExtensionManifestV2Unsupported,ExtensionManifestV2Disabled trick) > > On my phone: > When AdGuard is ENABLED, on Chrome and Firefox the content is blocked. > When AdGuard is DISABLED, on Chrome the content is visible with ads, and on Firefox the content is visible with uBlockOrigin ENABLED and ads blocked. > > Can anyone help me? > > Screenshot(s): > > Chrome for Android 146.0.7680.119 (Android 16 with Adguard 4.12.81 ENABLED) > > https://i.imgur.com/gPmC9cd.jpeg > > Chrome for Android 146.0.7680.119 (Android 16 with Adguard 4.12.81 DISABLED) > > https://i.imgur.com/CRqKUfD.jpeg > > Firefox for Android 148.0.2 (Android 16 with Adguard 4.12.81 ENABLED and uBlockOrigin 1.70.0 ENABLED) > > https://i.imgur.com/Kn6b3xK.jpeg > > Firefox for Android 148.0.2 (Android 16 with Adguard 4.12.81 DISABLED and uBlockOrigin 1.70.0 ENABLED) > > https://i.imgur.com/Jmtw6sO.jpeg > > This code worked on AdGuard, it is no longer working, that fixed my problem some time ago > > `ole.com.ar#@#div[class^="sc-"]:has(>` div > div[id^="div-gpt-"]) > > Filter lists you're using: > > uBlock filters - Ads > uBlock filters - Badware risks > uBlock filters - Privacy > uBlock filters - Unbreak > Easylist > Easyprivacy > Online Malicious URL Blocklist > Peters Lowe's Ad and tracking server list > Adguard Spanish/Portuguese > Easylist Spanish > > Also I add my uBlockOrigin information for my Firefox for Android for the webiste: > https://www.ole.com.ar/seleccion/guatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html > > > uBlockOrigin information > Other details: > > uBlock Origin: 1.70.0 > Firefox Mobile: 148 > filterset (summary): > network: 175057 > cosmetic: 50409 > scriptlet: 31226 > html: 2991 > listset (total-discarded, last-updated): > removed: > adguard-mobile: null > added: > https://raw.github.com/reek/anti-adblock-killer/master/anti-adblock-killer-filters.txt: 0-0, now > default: > user-filters: 165-0, never > ublock-filters: 49168-80, now > ublock-badware: 10748-30, now > ublock-privacy: 3844-2, now > ublock-unbreak: 2795-1, now > ublock-quick-fixes: 456-13, now > easylist: 97657-166, now > easyprivacy: 55546-29, now > urlhaus-1: 27030-11, now > plowe-0: 3516-1016, now > spa-0: 3755-16, now > spa-1: 6777-276, now > filterset (user): [array of 170 redacted] > trustedset: > added: [array of 6 redacted] > switchRuleset: > added: [array of 1 redacted] > userSettings: > advancedUserEnabled: true > cloudStorageEnabled: true > userFiltersTrusted: true > hiddenSettings: [none] > supportStats: > allReadyAfter: 213 ms (selfie) > maxAssetCacheWait: 74 ms > cacheBackend: indexedDB > popupPanel: > blocked: 20 > network: > amazon-adsystem.com: 1 > cloudflareinsights.com: 2 > doubleclick.net: 1 > googletagmanager.com: 2 > jwpcdn.com: 1 > jwpltx.com: 6 > permutive.app: 1 > rubiconproject.com: 3 > s-onetag.com: 2 > taboola.com: 1 > extended: > ##div[class^="sc-"]:has(> .lazyBanner) > ##.bannerTopHeader > ##div[id^="div-gpt-"]:not([style^="width: 1px; height: 1px; posi… > ##[id^="div-gpt-ad"]:not([style^="width: 1px; height: 1px; posit… > `#@#div[id^="div-gpt-"]` > `#@#[id^="div-gpt-ad"]` ``` Username: @maxelo ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mmhgskwahjkcg88sgoko0s0owksg4owpyly1jv1zdw.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8xd2fifbfaww8og0848wg0g0cgoo8g0r964f7wkym8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/tfipav4eqqokgk48go8swwgg4sgwwcc86318muj2cc.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9nnjnlbl20cog884oo888k4ckos4ogsguxen5rrgxk.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.81 System version: | `Android 16, One UI 8.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter Custom filters: | `uBlock filters - Ads`,
`uBlock filters - Badware risks`,
`uBlock filters - Privacy`,
`uBlock filters - Unbreak`,
`Easylist`,
`Easyprivacy`,
`Online Malicious URL Blocklist`,
`Peters Lowe's Ad and tracking server list`,
`Adguard Spanish/Portuguese`,
`Easylist Spanish` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/import?product=and&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ole.com.ar%2Fseleccion%2Fguatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html&version=4.12.81&filters=AdGuard+Base+filter&custom_filters=uBlock+filters+-+Ads%2CuBlock+filters+-+Badware+risks%2CuBlock+filters+-+Privacy%2CuBlock+filters+-+Unbreak%2CEasylist%2CEasyprivacy%2COnline+Malicious+URL+Blocklist%2CPeters+Lowe%27s+Ad+and+tracking+server+list%2CAdguard+Spanish%2FPortuguese%2CEasylist+Spanish&stealth=1)
